title.en: He kept shuttling and gradually moving far away...

content.en:
Ye Tian only wanted to study the corpse of the Ultimate Strength Strongman, and he didn't want to compete for other treasures, and those treasures were not something that a mere thirteen-dimensional powerhouse could participate in.

And he obviously couldn't capture the complete Polarization Corpse, and now he was able to obtain a section of the arm of the Polarization Powerhouse's corpse, which was already very good.

He kept shuttling and gradually moving far away from there.

After that, he kept making detours and returned to Tianwei Pavilion.

Upon his return, he immediately began his retreat.

......

"It's worthy of the corpse of the ultimate powerhouse, this arm is too perfect!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He found that even if it was a true copy of his own external body, it was only a little stronger than this ultimate body in terms of physical strength.

The key is that the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth here only allow the refining of the physical body, and there is no other energy system, nor does it have any supreme dimensional domain body, just a pure physical body.

To reach this point in pure flesh, it was impossible for him to do it in the multidimensional territory he was in.

But the body of the divine dimension can do it, and this is the effect of the power of the divine dimension of this heaven and earth.

It is precisely because of this that by studying the power of the divine dimension, there is hope that he can create his own ultimate dimensional killing move.

Time passed, and Ye Tian was still studying.

770 this day.

He went out of the customs and inquired about the matter of the Ultimate Strength Being, this matter caused a lot of waves in the Xuantian Domain, and the members of the Tianwei Pavilion naturally knew about it.

Soon, Ye Tian learned about what happened from the members of Tianwei Pavilion.

"It turns out that the last eighteenth-dimensional powerhouse appeared and took away the treasure!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian silently studied the arm of the Ultimate Strongman, and realized the mystery of the Ultimate Strongman's body.

And he also found a little defect in his body, and he is also constantly improving the Tianwei Secret Method.

Gradually, it was another hundred gods and the time passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already perfected the Tianwei Secret Method to the current limit, and it would not be a problem for him to cultivate to the eighteenth dimensional realm.

And his cultivation has officially stepped into the fourteen-dimensional realm, and he has also created an extremely terrifying killing move by polarizing the arm of the strong - Golden Arm Kill!

The effect of this killing move is to concentrate the power of the whole body on the arm, and cause the blessing of the divine power between heaven and earth, so as to tear the dimensional void to the extent that it is enough to kill the fifteenth dimensional powerhouse in one move.

However, even the Golden Arm (CDEC) kill is far from being the ultimate dimensional kill, and can only be regarded as the top regular kill.

"In the Xuantian Domain, my strength should belong to the most powerful group!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, the Xuantian Domain is placed in the entire Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and it is only a remote place, and there is not even a sixteenth dimensional powerhouse on the bright side.

There may have been sixteenth-dimensional powerhouses, but they have all gone to other places to seek a higher realm, and they will not stay in the Xuantian Domain.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry to go to other places, he was ready to continue to expand Tianwei Pavilion, he wanted to make Tianwei Pavilion the most powerful force in the Xuantian Domain, and then develop towards other places step by step.

As a result, he recruited a large number of children with high talent in the Divine Dimension, as well as members of various clans who had just entered cultivation.

Gradually, there were more and more members of the Tianwei Pavilion.

And such an unscrupulous solicitation naturally aroused the dissatisfaction of other forces.

......

Xuantian Domain.

Waterfront Sect.

This is one of the top sects in the Xuantian Domain, with two ancestors in the fifteen-dimensional realm, and there are many powerhouses in the thirteenth and fourteenth dimensions.

The point is that Ye Tian's Tianwei Pavilion is just within the territory of the Waterfront Sect, and the Tianwei Pavilion is here to frantically recruit those children with divine talents, which is undoubtedly the root of the foundation of the Waterfront Sect's growth!

Therefore, after the Waterfront Sect found out, it naturally wanted to destroy Tianwei Pavilion.

Tianwei Pavilion.

Chen Jingying came to report.

"Pavilion Master, we have three members of the Nine Dimensional Realm and many members of the Sixth and Seventh Dimensions who were killed by the Waterfront Sect when we were recruiting a group of children. "

When Ye Tian heard this, he was immediately furious.

"Waterfront Sect!"

Ye Tian was very annoyed, a strong man from the Waterfront Sect had come to warn him before, but he didn't expect to do it so quickly.

"I'll take care of this!"

Ye Tian said.

Chen Jingying reminded: "Pavilion Master, the Waterfront Sect is very powerful, with two fifteen-dimensional powerhouses!"

"Don't worry, I can handle it!"

Ye Tian said.

Subsequently, he personally went to the Waterfront Sect.

......

Waterfront Sect.

It occupies a large mountain range, and a large number of powerful people live here.

Moreover, there are thousands of castles in the vicinity of the Binshui Sect, guarding the headquarters of the Binshui Sect.

this day.

Ye Tian crossed over and descended on the outside of the waterfront sect.

At this time, the powerhouses of the Waterfront Sect sensed it one after another, and appeared one by one.

"Who is Your Excellency?"

"Tianwei Pavilion, Yang Wu!"

Ye Tian introduced himself.

"It's you!"

Many powerhouses of the Waterfront Sect were stunned, they didn't expect the pavilion master of Tianwei Pavilion to dare to come here.

"Kill him together!"

These powerhouses besieged Ye Tian.

However.

Puff puff puff!!

Before the powerhouses could react, they were easily slaughtered by Ye Tian.

At this moment, Han Dongshi, a fifteen-dimensional powerhouse of the Waterfront Sect, appeared and directly attacked Ye Tian.

"Golden Arm Kill!"

Ye Tian performed this killer move.

Burst!

Han Dongshi's killing move was shattered by Ye Tian's blow, and the light of the golden arm kill penetrated Han Dongshi, completely killing him.

With just one move, a fifteen-dimensional powerhouse was killed, and countless powerhouses in the entire Waterfront Sect were shocked.

At this time.

Another fifteen-dimensional powerhouse of the Waterfront Sect was so frightened that he hurriedly ran away, but was quickly caught up by Ye Tian and sent him on his way with a golden arm.

At this point, the two fifteen-dimensional powerhouses of the Waterfront Sect fell and died one after another.

Immediately after, Ye Tian performed a range-type killing move, shaking the dimensional void with his pure flesh body, and diffusing the attack power.

Bang bang bang!!!

A large number of Waterfront Sect disciples burst out one after another.

Not long after, the entire Waterfront Sect was slaughtered by Ye Tian.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian left the Waterfront Sect, but this matter had already been publicized.

Soon, it was rumored from all over the Xuantian Domain that Yang Wu of the Tianwei Pavilion had destroyed the Waterfront Sect and killed the two fifteenth-dimensional powerhouses of the Waterfront Sect.

Suddenly, many forces were afraid of Yang Wu.

Somewhere in the Xuantian Domain.

Baili Qingye, who was already a powerhouse of the Nine Dimensions, also came to Xuantian City and heard about Yang Wu's affairs.

"Yang Wu, could it be my Senior Brother Yang Wu? Impossible, although Senior Brother Yang Wu is very demonic, he was only in the seven-dimensional realm when he left, and now even if he is demonic, he will be in ten dimensions at most. And this legendary Yang Wu was the one who killed two powerhouses of the fifteen-dimensional realm, and he was the top existence in the Xuantian Domain. "

She shook her head, only thinking that the two were the same name, not the same person.
